engine_phase: Phase C – Effect Dispatcher Expansion Complete
notes: Monster vertical slice fully validated
Item vertical slice fully validated
Quest vertical slice fully validated (MVL v2 PASS)
Effect/Event schema filenames aligned with SSOT semantics
MVL auto-scan test_*.json enabled
Schema Gate and Behavior Gate confirmed stable
Engine Phase B MVL implemented: content_loader / quest_runtime / effect_executor / save_manager / cli_mvl
Engine loader treats missing $schema in fixtures as warning (non-fatal) for CLI MVL loop
CLI MVL loop verified: load → accept → progress → check → complete → save
CLI questdump enhanced to show semantic previews (complete_condition + rewards.effects shape)
Behavior Gate verified (smoke tests): q.side.slime_hunt = flag.int_compare(gte) on flg.kill.slime.count; q.elite.trial_of_balance = and([flag.int_compare, inventory.has])
Accept Gate implemented: accept_condition evaluated via Condition evaluator (flag.is_true / flag.is_false)
State SSOT verified: condition evaluation reads flags/inventory from save.game_state (single source of truth)
Effect dispatch verified on quest completion: rewards.effects supports gold.add + flag.set (MVP)
Save evolution (backward compatible): SaveBlob includes completed_ids (list[str])
CLI safety: active quest guard prevents accepting new quest if active_quest not completed
CLI behavior: complete clears active_quest and records quest_id into completed_ids
CLI lobby list: list prints [DONE]/[ACTIVE]/[READY]/[LOCKED] with LOCKED reason
Phase C completed (Engine layer only): expanded effect dispatcher inventory.add / inventory.remove / flag.int_add / var.add
Phase C regression PASS: legacy effects (gold.add / flag.set) remain stable; save compatibility preserved; no schema/structure changes; no version bump
next_targets: Decide canonical semantics for one-shot vs repeatable quests (completed_ids vs allow re-accept)

Option: list command enhance to show short 'needs:<flag>' formatting (QoL)
Phase C: add quest-type condition leaf (quest.is_completed) if quest-gating needs it (DD + schema update)
